query:
_sourceCategory=asoc/*signal*  
| json field=_raw "rule_name"
| json field=_raw "tags" nodrop
//| json field=_raw "summary"
| json field=_raw "entity_id"
| json field=_raw "suppressed_reasons" nodrop
| if (isempty(suppressed_reasons),"NO","YES") as suppressed
| if (suppressed="YES",1,0) as is_suppressed
| if(suppressed="NO",1,0) as is_generated
//| json field=_raw "content_type"
| json field=_raw "rule_id"
| json field=_raw "attack_stage"
| json field=_raw "severity"
//| json field=_raw "description"
| json field=_raw "id"
//| json field=_raw "objectClassification"
| json field=_raw "full_records[0].metadata_parser" as metadata_parser nodrop
| json field=_raw "full_records[0].metadata_product" as product  nodrop
| json field=_raw "full_records[0].metadata_vendor" as vendor nodrop
| json field=_raw "full_records[0].user_username" as user_username nodrop
| json field=_raw "full_records[0].metadata_deviceEventId" as deviceEventId nodrop
| json field=_raw "full_records[0].metadata_mapperName" as mapperName nodrop
//| json field=_raw "full_records[0].fields" as fields 
| count_distinct(entity_id) as entities,count_distinct(user_username) as usernames, sum(is_suppressed) as suppressed,sum(is_generated) as created,count as signals by rule_id,rule_name,severity,attack_stage,product,vendor,deviceEventId 
| sort rule_name asc

sources.dashboardDescription: Example signals search to count by common fields.
